name: USS SC-1041 (SC-1041)
events: 28 Jul 1945 Around 0730 K/28, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) made rendezvous with USS Threadfin (T/Cdr. J.J. Foote, USN) and her escort, USS SC 1041 (Lt.(jg) A.J. Hicks, Jr., USNR).
The escort had joined USS Threadfin about an hour earlier.
They arrived at Guam around 1030 K/28. USS Threadfin ending her 3rd war patrol. (1)
